cto.title: Merge gate and release confidence
cto.headline: CTO cares that the org-fleet completed its approval chain cleanly.
cto.ask: Keep the final approval trail intact.

vp.title: Quality, security, and health
vp.headline: VP cares about quality gates and resilience across the org chart.
risks: watch for missing CI or health snapshots
vp.ask: Keep the gate and the health checks aligned.

director.title: Execution flow and ownership
director.headline: Director cares about ownership and approval flow across layers.
risks: avoid stale ownership or off-by-one checkpoint state
director.ask: Keep the org chart in sync with the live work.

manager.title: Near-term work and ETA
manager.headline: Manager cares that this slice is complete and there is nothing left to unblock.
risks: refresh the tracker if the state file is stale
manager.ask: Focus the next cycle on the next highest-ROI task.
